headline: Frontend / Full-stack · AI Agent Engineer
tagline: Shipping ideas with clean code and dependable delivery—working AI-native by default: using LLMs and agents to speed design, implementation, and validation so humans stay focused on architecture and business impact.
bio: I'm Yan Xia, focused on full-stack web and production-grade AI agents—from conversational agents to platform capabilities, FastAPI + Vue stacks to multimodal scenarios. I practice LLM-assisted development daily (e.g. Cursor) while caring about performance, accessibility, and maintainability. Reach out via the links below.
